title: Jacques Brel Is Alive and Well and Living in Paris
original_title: Jacques Brel Is Alive and Well and Living in Paris
overview: Three attendees at a puppet theater don various roles in order to sing a variety of songs by Jacques Brel, all while hippies and other eccentrics cavort about them.
